name: Polar Whirlwind
description: Polar Whirlwind is the winter version of the Air Skylander, Series 2 Whirlwind. She was released as a special variant in Skylanders: Giants.
biography: Polar Whirlwind is the winter version of the Air Skylander, Series 2 Whirlwind. Being a unicorn/dragon hybrid, Whirlwind was never truly accepted by either species. The unicorns were envious of her ability to fly, and the dragons were jealous of her graceful beauty. But she found peace within the stormy clouds, where she learned to harness the power of the rainbow, making it a powerful force for good. Now, as a Skylander, she protects Skylands with her unique powers.
personality: Whirlwind is known for being graceful, courageous, and determined. Despite being an outcast in her youth, she uses her unique heritage to help others and defend the Skylands.

story.content: Polar Whirlwind is a rare variant of the Air Skylander, Whirlwind. She has been seen sporting a white and blue coat suited for the frozen peaks of Skylands. Unlike the standard Whirlwind, she is specially adapted for winter environments.

trivia: Polar Whirlwind's wings are blue in some occasions in the game but the toy does not show her with blue wings.

Her colorfully-glowing horn indicates her Wow Pow, Cloudbursting. However in Skylanders: Swap Force, her horn doesn't glow and there is a glitch in which it does if she doesn't fully charge her Rainbow Singularity attack.
She is one of the few variants that has a different color scheme in-game than her standard counterpart.
gameplay: Polar Whirlwind plays identically to Series 2 Whirlwind, utilizing rainbows and clouds to attack enemies. Her rainbows can bounce between enemies and her clouds provide area-of-effect damage. Her Wow Pow allows her to charge her rainbows for extra explosive damage.

basic.name: Rainbow of Doom
basic.content: Shoots a rainbow that can damage enemies and bounce between them.

basic.name: Tempest Cloud
basic.content: Creates a cloud that rains down lightning on enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Dragon Flight
basic_upgrades.content: Allows Whirlwind to fly over obstacles.

basic_upgrades.name: Healing Rainbows
basic_upgrades.content: Rainbows heal allies in co-op mode.

soulgems.name: Rainbow Singularity
soulgems.content: Summons a black hole rainbow that sucks in enemies.

wow_pows.name: Cloudbursting
wow_pows.content: Hold the Rainbow button to charge a rainbow that creates a large explosion.

abilities.name: Atomic Rainbow
abilities.content: Rainbows create a large explosion on impact.
